name: producer-claim-density-boost
description: v1.7.1 — claim-density boost. A dense fact-check claim (multiple compound-claim patterns + funding round + spoken number + attribution) should push producer ahead of troll even though the transcript also carries classic troll hype cues. Pre-v1.7.1 the producer's claim input was binary (has-claim → 0 boost); with the density boost a topScore-4+ claim gets a proportional bump that tips close ties. Fixture is a realistic TWiST-style sentence: Adobe acquired Figma for twenty billion dollars in 2022 according to Bloomberg — that's four distinct strict patterns in one clause.

input.transcript: Adobe acquired Figma for twenty billion dollars in 2022 according to Bloomberg, which makes it the largest design-tools acquisition ever.
